category_sources: source_facts.description says "Tiny c++ interpreter"; official project site describes Cpi as a tiny interpreter for C++20 or C++23.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpi; official project site title and README use cpi/Cpi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site is the project documentation surface with requirements, install, interactive mode, executive mode, and examples; GitHub README is also official.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/treefrogframework/cpi; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a tiny C++ interpreter; official project site documents interactive mode, executable mode, shebang scripting, and C++20/C++23 support.
